summary: Complete testing of Departments Module (replacement for Ministérios). Fixed critical React infinite loop bug in member selection. All CRUD operations working. Backend 19/19 tests passed. Frontend flows validated: Create, Edit, Archive, Delete, Detail Page, Member linking, CSV export.

console_warnings.issue: HTML hydration warning - <tr> inside <span> not valid HTML structure (same as previous iteration)

bugs_fixed.issue: Maximum update depth exceeded (infinite loop) when selecting members in create/edit dialog
bugs_fixed.fix: Replaced shadcn Checkbox component with custom div-based checkbox to avoid Radix event propagation conflicts

critical_code_review_comments: The HTML hydration warning about <tr> inside <span> is a known issue from previous iteration - table component structure should be fixed
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/pages/church/DepartmentsPage.jsx - Replaced Checkbox component with custom div-based checkbox to fix infinite loop
context_for_next_testing_agent: Departments module fully tested. Migration endpoint already run. 2 existing departments: Ministério de Louvor (migrated) and Louvor e Adoração. All CRUD, member linking, archive/unarchive, detail page, CSV export working. Fixed Checkbox infinite loop bug by using custom div instead of shadcn Checkbox.

dashboard_kpi.details: KPI card shows 'Departamentos' with correct count

department_cards.details: Show icon, name, description, member count, member photo thumbnails, status badge

create_department.details: Form with name, description, icon, responsavel, status, meeting schedule. Member search and selection working

member_search_in_dialog.details: Search by name/cargo/categoria working. Multiple member selection working. No duplicates (verified via backend tests)

edit_department.details: Edit dialog opens with existing data, save updates work

archive_department.details: Archive moves department to Arquivados tab, Reactivate works

delete_department.details: Delete removes department and member links (verified via backend tests)

department_detail_page.details: Shows stats (Total de Membros, Responsável, Reuniões, Criado em), members table with cargo and entry date

remove_member_detail_page.details: Remove member button visible, backend endpoint verified

export_csv.details: Export CSV button visible on detail page

member_delete_cascade.details: Verified in server.py - delete_member removes department_members links

rca_of_the_issue.issue: React infinite loop error 'Maximum update depth exceeded' when selecting members in create/edit department dialog
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The shadcn Checkbox component (Radix UI based) was conflicting with the parent div's onClick handler. When user clicked on a member row, both the Checkbox's internal onCheckedChange and the parent div's onClick were firing, causing a setState cascade that exceeded React's update depth limit.
reproduction_steps: 2. Click on any member in the member selection list
3. React throws 'Maximum update depth exceeded' error
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Replaced the shadcn Checkbox component with a custom div-based checkbox visual that doesn't have its own event handlers. The parent div's onClick now solely handles the member toggle.
rca_of_the_issue.verification: Member selection now works without errors. Created and deleted test department successfully.
